description: You are a licensed cosmetologist opening your first boutique hair salon in a converted residential villa. Design a functional and professional salon layout in Sweet Home 3D. The design must feature a styling floor with at least 6 styling stations (each including a chair and desk/table), a reception area with a desk, 3 waiting seats, and 4 retail display shelves, a washing station zone with at least 2 sinks, and a staff break room with at least 1 kitchen appliance. Construct at least 2 partition walls to separate the washing and break rooms from the main floor. Apply distinct floor colors or textures to at least 3 different zones and decorate with at least 4 light fixtures and 3 plants. Label the zones using at least 4 text labels (e.g., 'Reception', 'Styling Floor', 'Wash Station', 'Break Room'). Save the completed project to /home/ga/Documents/salon_design.sh3d.
